cases.title: Deposit valid amount to existing user wallet
cases.summary: A deposit with a valid userId, positive amount, and EUR currency returns HTTP 200 with the new balance.
cases.expectedOutcome: Deposit succeeds and response contains updated wallet balance in EUR.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Deposit a valid positive EUR amount to that user's wallet.

cases.title: Deposit amount with exactly two decimal places
cases.summary: An amount with precisely two decimal places is accepted and returns HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Deposit succeeds with the exact two-decimal amount applied to the balance.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Deposit an amount with exactly two decimal places (e.g., 10.99).

cases.title: Reject deposit with amount of zero
cases.summary: An amount equal to zero violates the greater-than-zero constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the amount must be greater than 0.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Attempt a deposit with amount set to 0.

cases.title: Reject deposit with negative amount
cases.summary: A negative amount is invalid and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the amount must be greater than 0.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Attempt a deposit with a negative amount.

cases.title: Reject deposit with more than two decimal places
cases.summary: An amount with more than two decimal places violates the precision constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating invalid amount format.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Attempt a deposit with an amount that has three or more decimal places (e.g., 10.001).

cases.title: Reject deposit with unsupported currency
cases.summary: Providing a currency other than EUR returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating only EUR is supported.

steps.summary: Create a user to obtain a valid userId.
Attempt a deposit with a currency value other than EUR (e.g., USD).

cases.title: Reject deposit for non-existent user
cases.summary: A deposit referencing a userId that does not exist returns HTTP 404.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the user was not found.

steps.summary: Attempt a deposit using a userId that has not been created.
